attributes.name: dropdown-content-direction
attributes.description: Set the flex direction of the content of the dropdown.

properties.name: dropdownContentDirection
properties.description: Set the flex direction of the content of the dropdown.

slots.description: Default slot for the tab group

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-group-dropdown-tab-text
cssProperties.description: Define the tab text color in the dropdown

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-group-dropdown-tab-text-hover
cssProperties.description: Define the tab text hover color in the dropdown

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-group-dropdown-tab-text-active
cssProperties.description: Define the tab text active color in the dropdown

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-group-dropdown-background
cssProperties.description: Define the background color of the dropdown

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-group-gap
cssProperties.description: Define the gap between elements dropdown. Only pixel values are valid

tags.name: uui-tabs
tags.description: A single tab. Should be put into `<uui-tab-group>`,

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Reflects the disabled state of the element. True if tab is disabled. Change this to switch the state programmatically.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Set an href, this will turns the inner button into a anchor tag.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Set the visual orientation of this tab, this changes the look and placement of the active indication.

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Reflects the disabled state of the element. True if tab is disabled. Change this to switch the state programmatically.

properties.name: href
properties.description: Set an href, this will turns the inner button into a anchor tag.

properties.name: target
properties.description: Set an anchor tag target, only used when using href.

properties.name: rel
properties.description: Set the rel attribute for an anchor tag, only used when using href.

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Set the visual orientation of this tab, this changes the look and placement of the active indication.

properties.name: active
properties.description: Set this boolean to true for then the related composition is sorted.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-text-hover
cssProperties.description: Define the tab text hover color

cssProperties.name: --uui-tab-text-active
cssProperties.description: Define the tab text active color
